age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 19 years Maximum Age: 43 years (as on 01-10-2026) Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

qualification.education_qualification: Post Graduate degree in Chemistry preferably in Inorganic Chemistry or equivalent
qualification.details: Post Graduate degree in Chemistry preferably in Inorganic Chemistry or equivalent.

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 07-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of MPSC to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the MPSC Chemist Group-B recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application form for the MPSC Chemist Group-B recruitment is 07 July 2026. Ensure your application is submitted well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the minimum and maximum age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The minimum age limit is 19 years and the maximum age limit is 43 years as of 01 October 2026. Age relaxation will be provided as per government norms.

faq.question: Q3. What are the educational qualifications required for the Chemist Group-B post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Post Graduate degree in Chemistry, preferably in Inorganic Chemistry, or an equivalent qualification from a recognized university or institution.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for the Chemist Group-B post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies announced for the Chemist Group-B position in this recruitment drive by MPSC.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for different categories?
faq.answer: The application fee for UR candidates is Rs. 394/-, while for OBC/EWS/Orphan/PWD candidates, it is Rs. 294/-.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary structure for the selected candidates?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a salary in the pay scale of Rs. 41,800 to Rs. 1,32,300 per month.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for MPSC Chemist Group-B recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process will primarily involve a Written Examination followed by Document Verification to assess the suitability of the candidates.

faq.question: Q8. Can candidates from outside Maharashtra apply for this post?
faq.answer: The notification is released by MPSC, which typically recruits for state government posts. Interested candidates should check the official notification for specific domicile requirements.

faq.question: Q9. How can I pay the application fee?
faq.answer: The application fee can be paid online. The last date for online fee payment and challan generation/payment is 07 July 2026.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: The official notification and the online application link are available on the MPSC official website. Direct links are provided in the 'Important Links' section of this article.
